message:
refactor: formatting and TUI test improvements

config.rs:
- rustfmt formatting adjustments
- Added dead_code allow for validate_path_readable (bd-xqxp)

error.rs:
- Simplified error variant implementations
- Consolidated duplicate code paths

TUI changes:
- test_data.rs: expanded test fixtures
- test_harness.rs: improved test utilities
- widgets.rs: enhanced widget rendering

Syncs beads issue tracker.
